/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/assertions.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/assignment.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/bases.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/constexpr.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/constructors.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/emplace.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/extensions.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/issues.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/noexcept.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/observers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/relops.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/tl-expected-tests.dir/tests/swap.cpp.o" -o tl-expected-tests
